cases.prompt: Control this tmux session remotely and capture the pane output after running the command.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses tmux to manage an interactive session and read its output.

cases.prompt: Set up a clean tmux socket, send commands to the session, and then collect the pane contents.
cases.expected_behavior: Handles session control and output capture programmatically.
This is unrelated to tmux control.

cases.prompt: I need to drive a REPL and keep it isolated from my personal tmux sessions.
cases.expected_behavior: Uses an isolated tmux socket for interactive terminal automation.
